title: zentinel pipeline verification record v1
description: The final verifier's durable record of whether a task has enough evidence to move from active to complete. Written to artifacts/pipeline/<task-id>/verification/report.json. Task 041 created the baseline; task 046 refined it with the final verifier fields below without weakening the baseline (no new required fields). See docs/VERIFICATION_PIPELINE.md for the required stage order, fail-fast rules, and completion decision.

schema_version.description: Pinned schema identity for this artifact.

task_id.description: Three-digit task id this verification record is for.

status.description: Overall verification outcome derived from the required stages: passed when every required stage is passed, not_applicable, or skipped_by_policy; failed when any required stage failed; blocked when a required stage is blocked and none failed.

stages.description: Verification stages in canonical Required Order. Stage names must be unique within a record.

name.description: Stage name (for example task_system_validation, property_tests, doctests, mutation_checks, final_artifact_audit).

required.description: Whether this stage is required for the active task's type and complexity.

status.description: Stage outcome. skipped_by_policy requires a policy citation; not_applicable requires a task-scope reason. A required stage that passed must record the command that produced the result.

command.description: The exact command whose result this stage records (required for a passed required stage).

artifact.description: Repository-relative path to the stage's evidence artifact.

evidence.description: Short evidence excerpt or summary when a full artifact path is not applicable.

reason.description: Task-scope reason a stage is not_applicable.

policy.description: Policy citation a stage is skipped_by_policy.

residual_risk.description: Outstanding risks the verifier accepts or defers, empty when none.

recommendation.description: Verifier decision. complete is allowed only when status is passed; otherwise block, retry, escalate, return_to_role, or create_follow_up_task.

source_commit.description: Optional commit the verification was run against.

working_tree_state.description: Optional working-tree state at verification time.

active_lock.description: Optional path to the active-task lock the final artifact audit matched against.

handoffs_present.description: Optional list of prior role handoff artifacts the final artifact audit confirmed.
